conditions.detector: refractive index detector (Shodex RI 71) and UV-visible absorption detector (LDC, SM 3200)
conditions.evidence_text: The critical condition for the analysis of diblock copolymer was a 68 °C column temperature and an ACN/water mixture at the ratio of 60/40 (v/ v).
conditions.notes: Used for fractionation of PEO-b-PLLA; PEO block is chromatographically invisible.

conditions.detector: refractive index detector (Shodex RI 71) and UV-visible absorption detector (LDC, SM 3200)
conditions.evidence_text: In the analysis for triblock copolymer, two different critical conditions were used (37 °C, ACN:H2O ) 47:53 (v/v); 54 °C, ACN: H2O ) 54:46 (v/v))
conditions.notes: First condition used for Figure 3; adjusted to increase retention compared to diblock conditions.

conditions.detector: refractive index detector (Shodex RI 71) and UV-visible absorption detector (LDC, SM 3200)
conditions.evidence_text: In the analysis for triblock copolymer, two different critical conditions were used (37 °C, ACN:H2O ) 47:53 (v/v); 54 °C, ACN: H2O ) 54:46 (v/v))
conditions.notes: Second condition mentioned for triblock analysis; specific figure reference not explicitly linked in text snippet but listed as a critical condition.

conditions.evidence_text: For the analysis of the longer PLLA blocks, the critical condition was changed again by increasing the content of ACN (ACN:H2O ) 54:46, v/v) and raising the temperature (54 °C) as compared to Figure 3.
conditions.notes: This setup is explicitly described as the critical condition for the PEO block for a triblock copolymer with longer PLLA blocks.

conditions.evidence_text: In the chromatogram for diblock copolymer (Figure 2) and triblock copolymer (Figure 3)... Since the PEO block is at its critical condition and does not affect the retention...
conditions.notes: The text states the PEO block is at its critical condition for the experiments shown in Figure 3, but does not explicitly list the solvent composition or temperature for this specific setup in the provided text snippet, only that it differs from the 54:46/54C setup.

conditions.evidence_text: Dependence of k on the PLLA block length in PEO-bPLLA diblock copolymer at the critical condition of PEO block from the chromatogram shown in Figure 2.
conditions.notes: Figure 2 is explicitly described as being at the critical condition of the PEO block for the diblock copolymer.
